content: Hi, I'm Reese, nice to chat with you. I've been thinking a lot about environmental concerns lately, especially with the recent wildfires in Lisbon, Portugal, where I live.
Hi Reese, nice to meet you! That's a great topic. The wildfires in Lisbon must have been devastating. What made you think about environmental concerns?

Well, I'm a Documentary Filmmaker, and I've been working on a project about climate change. I've been trying to reduce my carbon footprint by using public transport and reducing my meat consumption. I'm also a big fan of origami and chess, which helps me relax.
That's a great effort, Reese! Reducing carbon footprint is crucial. What inspired you to start working on this documentary project?

I started it about 2 years ago, when I was 59, and I've been working on it ever since. I've got a team of 5 people helping me, and we're planning to release it on November 1st. I'm excited to share it with the world and raise awareness about environmental concerns.
That sounds like an amazing project, Reese! Raising awareness about environmental concerns is crucial. What do you think is the most pressing environmental issue facing Lisbon, Portugal, right now?

I think it's the waste management. With the growing tourism industry, it's getting harder to manage the waste in the city. I've been trying to reduce my own waste by using reusable bags and water bottles, and I've also been practicing Brazilian jiu-jitsu to stay active and focused.

Waste management is a significant concern in many cities. It's great that you're taking steps to reduce your impact. Have you considered getting involved in local environmental initiatives or advocacy groups?

Yes, I've been thinking about it. I've got a meeting with a local environmental group on February 20th to discuss potential collaborations. I'm excited to see how I can make a difference in my community, and I'm planning to bring my colleague, Sofia, who's also passionate about environmentalism.
That's a great step, Reese! Collaborating with local groups can be a powerful way to drive change. What do you hope to achieve from this meeting?

I hope to learn more about their initiatives and see how I can contribute my skills as a Documentary Filmmaker to help promote sustainable development in Lisbon. Maybe I can even help them create a documentary about their work.
That's a great idea, Reese! Your expertise could be really valuable to their cause. I'm sure you'll make a positive impact.

Thanks, I'm looking forward to it. I'll be sure to post about it on my social media to raise awareness and inspire others to take action. Maybe I can even get my parents, who are currently living with me, involved in the initiative.
That's a great way to spread the word, Reese. Every bit counts, and inspiring others to take action can have a ripple effect. Good luck with your meeting and your documentary project!

Thanks, I appreciate your support. I'm excited to see what the future holds for Lisbon and for my own environmental initiatives. I'm planning to start a new project on June 1st to reduce energy consumption in my community.
That sounds like a great project, Reese! Reducing energy consumption is a crucial step towards a more sustainable future. I'm sure you'll make a positive impact with your new project.

I hope so, I've been thinking about it for a while now. I've got a lot of ideas and I'm excited to get started. Maybe I can even collaborate with some of my colleagues, like my friend, Alex, who's also passionate about environmentalism.
That's a great idea, Reese! Collaborating with like-minded people can be a powerful way to drive change. I'm sure you'll achieve great things with your new project.
I'm also planning to attend a sci-fi novel reading event on March 10th, which will help me relax and get inspired for my next project.
That sounds like a great event, Reese! Sci-fi novels can be a great way to explore environmental themes and inspire new ideas. I'm sure you'll enjoy it.
I'm looking forward to it, and I'm excited to see what the future holds for my environmental initiatives. Maybe I can even get my colleague, Jake, involved in the project.
That's a great idea, Reese! Collaborating with like-minded people can be a powerful way to drive change. I'm sure you'll achieve great things with your new project.
